Landing.hero_desc: Draft reads your company's documents and automatically writes accurate, referenced answers to security questionnaires and procurement requests — in minutes, not weeks.
Landing.problem_title: RFPs are a $10B problem hiding in plain sight.
Landing.stat_1_label: Average time a sales engineer spends manually answering a single security questionnaire
Landing.stat_2_label: Of questions in procurement forms are repeated from one customer to the next
Landing.stat_3_label: Annual cost of a dedicated team answering security and procurement requests at a mid-size company
Landing.arch_title: Built to be trusted, not just fast.
Landing.arch_desc: Every technical decision was made with one goal: answers you can stand behind. Here is why.
Landing.arch_1_body: Draft searches your uploaded documents by meaning, not just keywords — so it finds the right policy even when the customer phrases the question differently.
Landing.arch_2_body: When you update a policy or add a new document, Draft picks it up immediately. No retraining, no waiting, no stale answers.
Landing.arch_3_why: Why not just search the whole document?
Landing.arch_3_body: Draft reads your documents in focused sections with slight overlap between them. This prevents missing context at the boundaries — a common cause of incomplete or wrong AI answers.
Landing.arch_4_body: Every answer shows the exact document and section it came from. Your team can verify before sending — and your customers can trust what they receive.
Landing.how_1_body: Add your security policies, certifications, and past questionnaire answers. Draft stores them securely and keeps them ready.
Landing.how_2_body: Drop in the spreadsheet of questions from your customer. Draft reads each one, finds the right information, and writes a clear, accurate answer.
Landing.how_3_body: Every answer comes with its source document. Review, edit if needed, then export — with confidence.
Landing.cta_tag: Ready to see it in action?

Setup.title: Knowledge Library
Setup.subtitle: Upload your company's security policies, certifications, and past questionnaire answers. Draft reads them and uses them to write accurate responses on your behalf.
Setup.supported_formats: PDF, Word, or plain text — up to 10MB

Respond.title: Questionnaire Auto-Fill
Respond.subtitle: Upload a spreadsheet with a "Question" column. Draft will search your Knowledge Library and write a precise, referenced answer for every row.
Respond.must_have_question: The spreadsheet must have a "Question" column
Respond.no_questions: No questions found. Make sure your spreadsheet has a "Question" column.

History.title: Past Questionnaires
History.subtitle: View and download questionnaires your team has already answered.

Team.title: Team
Team.subtitle: Manage who has access to your organization's workspace.
